titleStmt.title: SII 10.321: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 321. (A.R. No. 559 of 1925.) ON A PILLAR IN THE OUTER MAṆḌAPA OF THE TEMPLE OF RĀMALINGĒŚVARA, VĒLPŪRU, SATTENEPALLI TALUK, SAME DISTRICT. Ś. 1170. (Kīlaka)

summary.p: States that a certain Sūrapa-Nāyaka gave 25 cows for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Rāmēśvara at Vēlpunūru.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīśakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1170 yagu nēṁṭṭi
kīlakasaṁvatsara māgha ba . 14 śu . vēlpunūri
śrīrāmēśvara mahādēvaraku dannavāḍa Ama
rīśvarasthānamu vrittimaṁtuṁ ḍaina kaḍiyama
nāhiniki dāyamasāniki suputruṁ ḍaina Eṟṟama
nāhiniki vēlpūrivrittimaṁttu laina kūcemanā
hiniki baseṭṭiki suputri yaina Amarasāniki Eṟṟa
manāhiniki suputrakuladīpakuṟā laina lōkasā
niki mahādēvaniki suputuṁ ḍaina sūrapanāhiṁḍu
tama tallidaṁḍrulakuṁ gaṭṭikola guṁḍināhiniki
damaku dha¨rmmā¨rtthamugā nācaṁdrā¨rkka makhaṁḍḍava
¨rttidīpamuna kiccina mōdālu 25 vīniṁ jēkoni jakka
sāni kāṭebōyni koḍku Annebōyuṁḍu dana putrā
nupautrikamu nitya māneṁḍu neI vōyaṁgalavāṁḍu
Digital edition of SII 10.321 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
